zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Warrene於1409年出生在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，她的父親Lawrence de Warrene15歲，母親Lady Margery de Bulkeley21歲。她於大約1430年與Thurston de Holland III在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾丹頓享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Warrene于1409年出生在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，她的父亲Lawrence de Warrene15岁，母亲Lady Margery de Bulkeley21岁。她于大约1430年与Thurston de Holland III在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年在英国英格兰藍卡爾丹頓享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warrene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Warren
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Warrene was born in 1409, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lawrence de Warrene, was 15 and her mother, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, was 21. She married Thurston de Holland III about 1430, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1442, in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Warrene est née en 1409, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lawrence de Warrene, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thurston de Holland III environ 1430, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1442, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Warrene 1409 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lawrence de Warrene 15 und ihre Mutter Lady Margery de Bulkeley 21. Sie hat um 1430 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Thurston de Holland III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1442 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Warrene è nata il nel 1409 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lawrence de Warrene, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thurston de Holland III circa 1430, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1442, nel Denton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Warreneが1409年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Lawrence de Warreneは15歳，母Lady Margery de Bulkeleyは21歳であった。約1430年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでThurston de Holland IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアデントンで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Warrene(이)가 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lawrence de Warrene(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margery de Bulkeley(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Thurston de Holland III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 덴턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Warrene nasceu em 1409, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lawrence de Warrene, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thurston de Holland III aproximadamente 1430, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1442, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Warrene родилась в 1409 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lawrence de Warrene было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery de Bulkeley, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thurston de Holland III около 1430 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1442 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Warrene nació en 1409, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lawrence de Warrene, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thurston de Holland III aproximadamente 1430, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1442, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
